# View surface projection

<!-- GENERATED BY xtask index render; DO NOT EDIT. -->

- Feature id: `feature/sim-web/view-surface`
- Subject: `local/sim-web/crate/sim-lib-view`
- Canonical key: `crate/sim-lib-view/feature-sim-web-view-surface`

Expose view and edit surfaces so codecs, browser hosts, and device profiles can render and reverse surface data.
